name: Billy Sample
transactions: June 5, 1973:Drafted by theTexas Rangersin the28th roundof the 1973 amateur draft, but did not sign.
June 8, 1976:Drafted by theTexas Rangersin the10th roundof the 1976 amateur draft.

February 27, 1985:Traded by theTexas Rangerswith a player to be named later to theNew York YankeesforToby Harrah. TheTexas RangerssentEric Dersin(minors) (July 14, 1985) to theNew York Yankeesto complete the trade.
December 6, 1985:Traded by theNew York Yankeesto theAtlanta BravesforMiguel Sosa(minors).
February 24, 1987:Signed as a Free Agent with theMinnesota Twins.
